headline: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Raised Its Dividend, Where Does Fair Value Sit?
summary: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) has declared a third quarter 2026 cash dividend of $1.34 per share, providing income focused investors with fresh information on the stock’s current payout profile and upcoming key dates. See our latest analysis for Johnson & Johnson. The latest dividend announcement comes shortly after Johnson & Johnson reported second quarter 2026 results, raised full year sales guidance to US$100.8b to US$101.4b, and secured FDA approval for its dual energy THERMOCOOL SMARTTOUCH SF...
